description: Product-facing UX work must demonstrate planning, evidence, runtime proof, and explicit UX conformance quality.

rubric_dimensions.name: ui_validation_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: UX conformance must be explicit and passing.

rubric_dimensions.name: evidence_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Evidence bundle and judge output must be complete.

rubric_dimensions.name: operator_handoff_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: The operator should understand what changed and what remains unproven.

known_failure_cases: missing figma source mapping in UX response fields
runtime proof present but UX conformance evidence incomplete
